content: On mobile I have been unable to claim the rewards yesterday and today as well.  The 'play 50 cards' quest is completed and it shows the 'claim' button but when I try to click it nothing happens. (My touchscreen is not the issue, I tried). Also closing the game and trying again did not work.
Update: I spent some Reality Verge in the Archive and after I could finally claim my daily quest.... seems the issue is related to the resource being maxxed out?
Usually it should warn you that in claiming the daily you would miss out on the orb. Odd that it didn't even pop up
Yes I usually see this and then click on the option to not warn me for a week but this week it wouldn't show up... It did show up on my other account and I have had no issues there (same phone).
💭「Processing」Unable to claim the daily quest rewards
We tried it and didn't encounter this problem. Could you record a screen recording and provide it to us next time you collect it?
I will try but since I just spent my Reality Verege it will take a few days until they are maxxed out again
Okay, I'll wait for your screen recording.<:Pandia_love:1459078512303411261>
Oh, we have found the problem and are waiting for processing.<:cute1:1356053053568192717>  Don't bother recording the screen~
